query: 品牌核心元素： 品牌标志：RAN QIU 标志 主色调：#8B3A1E（深秋棕红）、#E8DCCB（米色）、#D4A574（金棕色） 设计风格：东方美学、极简主义、自然诗意、温暖治愈   视觉语言：充足留白、浅景深、暖色调、金色时光 制作一张符合品牌调性的宣传海报。采用温暖的秋日氛围，结合品牌标志和自然元素，营造诗意而宁静的视觉体验。

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为 RAN QIU 品牌生成一张宣传海报，东方美学风格，秋日氛围，诗意宁静。

风格/介质:极简主义东方美学海报，充足留白，暖色调，金色时光质感，浅景深，自然诗意，温暖治愈
构图:竖版中心构图，大面积留白，品牌标志居中或下方，自然元素点缀四周，视线引导由上至下
主体:品牌标志 "RAN QIU"，搭配秋日自然元素（如枯枝、落叶、芦苇或干花），形态轻盈疏朗
场景/背景:抽象秋日意境背景，米色 #E8DCCB 为底，营造晨雾或薄光弥漫的静谧氛围
光线/氛围:柔和漫射侧光，金色低角度暖光点染，色温偏暖，整体氛围宁静、诗意、治愈
色彩搭配:以 #E8DCCB 米色为主底色，#8B3A1E 深秋棕红作为品牌标志与核心视觉锚点，#D4A574 金棕色作为光晕与细节过渡，三色关系克制统一
材质/纹理:轻微纸张纹理或宣纸质感，自然元素带细腻真实感，整体无塑料感
文字(原文保留):"RAN QIU"
约束:留白面积不低于画面 50%；色彩严格限定在三色系内；品牌标志清晰可识别；整体不出现杂乱元素
避免:过度装饰、高饱和撞色、西式复古风、繁复花纹、渐变滥用、廉价暖调滤镜、文字堆砌

Create an original marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, evoking warm autumnal poetry and Eastern minimalist aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat editorial poster with Eastern minimalist sensibility, generous negative space, inspired by Japanese wabi-sabi and Chinese ink-wash restraint
Composition: centered vertical layout with ample breathing room, shallow depth of field implied through soft foreground/background separation, warm golden-hour light diffusion
Subject: brand identity "RAN QIU" as the visual anchor, surrounded by sparse natural elements — dried botanicals, fallen leaves, or a single branch — arranged with deliberate asymmetry
Scene/backdrop: soft abstract autumnal backdrop, muted and airy, suggesting late-afternoon light filtering through a window or open field
Lighting/mood: warm golden-hour glow, soft diffused light with no harsh shadows, tranquil and healing atmosphere
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brick-red) as the primary accent, #E8DCCB (warm beige) as the dominant background, #D4A574 (golden amber) as the secondary warm tone — colors work in quiet harmony, never competing
Materials/textures: delicate paper-like surface texture, subtle grain suggesting natural fiber, soft matte finish
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous white/negative space; brand mark "RAN QIU" must be legible and visually dominant; no busy backgrounds; color values must stay within the specified palette
Avoid: neon or cool tones, high-contrast harsh shadows, overly ornate decoration, Western maximalism, cluttered composition, generic stock-photo autumn clichés

Use case: logo-brand / promotional poster
Asset type: brand promotional poster, vertical crop
Primary request: a poetic and serene autumn-toned brand poster for RAN QIU, combining the brand mark with natural elements
Scene/backdrop: soft autumnal outdoor setting — fallen leaves, warm golden light filtering through sparse branches, ample negative space
Subject: brand identity composition featuring the "RAN QIU" logotype as the focal anchor, surrounded by delicate natural elements (dried botanicals, soft leaf silhouettes, subtle texture)
Style/medium: editorial fine-art photography aesthetic blended with minimalist graphic design; Eastern aesthetics, natural poetry, warm healing mood
Composition/framing: vertical portrait layout, centered or slightly off-center logotype, generous white/cream breathing space, shallow depth of field on natural elements
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm light, soft diffused glow, no harsh shadows — tranquil, intimate, poetic
Color palette: deep autumn brick-red #8B3A1E, warm beige #E8DCCB, golden tan #D4A574 — muted, harmonious, no cold tones
Materials/textures: fine linen or handmade paper texture in background, delicate pressed-leaf or botanical overlay, soft bokeh
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: preserve brand colors exactly (#8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574); keep layout minimal with ample negative space; "RAN QIU" logotype must be clearly legible
Avoid: busy backgrounds, neon or cool-toned lighting, cluttered composition, generic stock-photo feel
